name: Counter Craft: Battle Royale
description: Counter Craft: Battle Royale is a first person shooter game which features blocky zombie shooting and gun searching across vast map. Your mission is to survive and shoot 100 zombies in order to win.
instructions: WASD - Move LMB - Shoot RMB - Aim R - Reload G - Grenade Space - Jump F - Use C - Crouch
tags: 3D, 3D Games, Battlegrounds, First Person Shooter, Gun, Minecraft, Shoot, Shoot 'Em Up, Shooter, Shooting, Unity3D, Zombie
